name: What if no witnesses to my slip at work in Midvale?

mainEntity.name: What if no witnesses to my slip at work in Midvale?

acceptedAnswer.description: Claims proceed on medical records, photos, maintenance logs, your testimony, safety violations proving hazardous condition caused fall. Circumstantial evidence suffices.[3] Key factors: incident report, video footage request, expert on foreseeability. Report immediately, diagram scene; lawyer investigates. No witnesses common, still winnable.
